lines.speaker: a
lines.text: My boots are through at the toe again. This is no way to make a living.

lines.speaker: b
lines.text: Living? We're one bad toll from a noose, {a}. Keep your voice down.

lines.speaker: a
lines.text: Heard the Bureau strung up two of Hesk's crew at Harrowgate.

lines.speaker: b
lines.text: Then we work the south road. Quietly.

lines.speaker: a
lines.text: You ever think of just... farming?

lines.speaker: b
lines.text: With what land, {a}? With what the Capes left us?
